text:
(a) On receipt of a court order issued under Article 42.016 (Special Driver’s License or Identification Requirements for Certain Sex Offenders) , Code of Criminal Procedure, the department shall ensure that any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person includes an indication that the person:

(1) is subject to the registration requirements of Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure; and

(2) if applicable, is subject to registration because the person was convicted of an offense involving human trafficking under Chapter 20A (Trafficking of Persons) , Penal Code.

(b) The department shall include the indication required by Subsection (a) in any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person until the expiration of the person’s duty to register under Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.057 — Information Regarding Certain Sex Offenders

(a) On receipt of a court order issued under Article 42.016 (Special Driver’s License or Identification Requirements for Certain Sex Offenders) , Code of Criminal Procedure, the department shall ensure that any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person includes an indication that the person:

    (1) is subject to the registration requirements of Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure; and

    (2) if applicable, is subject to registration because the person was convicted of an offense involving human trafficking under Chapter 20A (Trafficking of Persons) , Penal Code.

(b) The department shall include the indication required by Subsection (a) in any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person until the expiration of the person’s duty to register under Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 93 (S.B.1527), Sec. 5.02, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: On receipt of a court order issued under Article 42.016 (Special Driver’s License or Identification Requirements for Certain Sex Offenders) , Code of Criminal Procedure, the department shall ensure that any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person includes an indication that the person:
is subject to the registration requirements of Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure; and
if applicable, is subject to registration because the person was convicted of an offense involving human trafficking under Chapter 20A (Trafficking of Persons) , Penal Code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall include the indication required by Subsection (a) in any driver’s license record or personal identification certificate record maintained by the department for the person until the expiration of the person’s duty to register under Chapter 62 (Sex Offender Registration Program) , Code of Criminal Procedure.

history.raw: Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 93 (S.B.1527), Sec. 5.02, eff. September 1, 2023.
